column3: I hypothesize that search-api source calls API for ALL uncompleted seeds on every turn, not just the batch, wasting quota. Test by simulating 60 seeds with batch=10.
column6: 55 API calls made instead of 10; 45 wasted

column3: I hypothesize that empty seedVideos (due to missing config/data) incorrectly triggers round-done because seeds.length===0 guard has no emptiness check. Test with cfg.seeds=undefined and prior-round-dir-missing.
column6: Both scenarios print "FALSE DONE" — round marked complete with zero work

column3: I hypothesize that videoSource.pages field in search-api config is silently ignored because page=1 is hardcoded in the URL. Test by code inspection.
I hypothesize that --batch=0 is coerced to default (15) because 0||15→15 in falsy-value check. Test with batchSize=0.
column6: 0||15 evaluates to 15; user cannot pass batch=0 for status-only

column3: Post-fix verification: all 4 bugs fixed, syntax valid, simulated tests pass.
column6: Search-api batched, seedVideos guarded, videoSource.pages honored, batchSize=0 respected
